g.text: Q9: Shared child profiles — full door and profile detail
Business question: Which child profiles span more than one door, and what do we know about them?
Returns: one row per door assignment — portal code, door status, profile attributes, total door
Note: shared-profile-001 has intentionally inconsistent ageRange/timezone values (data quality
# One row PER DOOR. The shared profile deliberately carries inconsistent
# attribute values (a data-quality anomaly); GROUP_CONCAT collapses those into
# one cell per door instead of an OPTIONAL cross-product (which produced 36 rows).
